final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for UGREEN NAS brand 618 anniversary celebration e-commerce announcement.

Style/medium: commercial e-commerce poster, modern tech aesthetic, clean and professional
Composition: centered layout optimized for e-commerce platforms, clear visual hierarchy with product focus
Subject: UGREEN NAS (network attached storage) product hero shot, sleek hardware design
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient or tech-inspired environment suggesting data/cloud storage, minimal to avoid distraction
Lighting/mood: soft studio lighting with subtle rim light on product, confident and trustworthy mood
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as primary accent, neutral dark background, white and silver highlights
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云品牌618周年庆活动电商宣布海报"
Constraints: must be readable as thumbnail on mobile e-commerce apps; text must remain legible at small sizes
Avoid: cluttered composition, generic stock photo feel, watermarks, overly complex backgrounds, 8K stuffer words
